title: CLI-Agent Security & Benchmark
title_zh: CLI-Agent 安全性与 Benchmark 构建
excerpt: A deep dive into CLI-based AI Agent security: datasets, evaluation benchmarks, indirect prompt injection attack vectors, and training pipelines for robustness testing.
excerpt_zh: 深入探讨 CLI-Agent 安全性：训练数据集调研、安全 Benchmark 设计、间接 Prompt 注入攻击向量分析与鲁棒性评测流程构建。

title: AI Agents & Frameworks
title_zh: AI Agent 与框架：系统感知智能
excerpt: Exploring system-aware intelligence in AI Agents — encoding system resource states into agent policy, and reinforcement learning for adaptive execution planning.
excerpt_zh: 探索 AI Agent 的系统感知智能：将系统资源状态编码进 Agent 策略，以强化学习驱动自适应执行规划。

title: Reinforcement Learning & Reasoning
excerpt: Notes on IRL vs. Behavior Cloning, the 'Era of Experience' paper by Silver & Sutton, and the future of grounded, experience-driven AI reasoning.
excerpt_zh: 逆向强化学习与行为克隆的对比分析，David Silver & Sutton 的「体验时代」论文精读，以及面向经验驱动 AI 推理的未来展望。

title: Mixture of Experts & Inference Speedup
excerpt: From the 1991 original MoE paper to modern sparse gating in LLMs. Also covers vLLM continuous batching, PagedAttention, and offline inference experiments.
excerpt_zh: 从 1991 年 MoE 开创性论文到现代 LLM 中的稀疏门控机制，涵盖 vLLM 连续批处理、PagedAttention 原理及离线推理实验记录。

title: Knowledge Distillation
excerpt: A systematic review of knowledge distillation: edge distillation, DKD loss reformulation, cross-layer distillation, and reproduction experiments on CIFAR-100.
excerpt_zh: 系统梳理知识蒸馏技术：边缘蒸馏、DKD Loss 重构、跨层蒸馏，以及在 CIFAR-100 上的复现实验记录。

title: Engineering Toolchain Notes
title_zh: 工程化工具链实践笔记
excerpt: Practical engineering notes: fixing GitLab Math Block rendering issues, Celery async task architecture for LLM fine-tuning pipelines, and LLaMA-Factory integration.
excerpt_zh: 工程实践笔记：修复 GitLab 公式渲染问题、基于 Celery 的 LLM 微调平台异步任务架构设计，以及 LLaMA-Factory 调试记录。

title: Hello World — My First Blog Post
excerpt: Welcome to my blog! This is my first post, written in Markdown and rendered dynamically.
excerpt_zh: 欢迎来到我的博客！这是第一篇用 Markdown 编写并动态渲染的文章。

title: Reflections
excerpt: Reflections on my exploration of new things and my苦恼 about my automation obsession.
excerpt_zh: 反思自己对新事物的探索性，以及对自己自动化追求的苦恼。
